title: Synergy H1 Microplate Reader: Fluorescence Assay
author: Alexander Ge
materials: Miniprep using QIAprep Spin, elute 50 µL EB

steps.title: Rehydrate Primers with IDTE Buffer; resuspend to 100 µM stock
steps.instruction: Rehydrate Primers with IDTE Buffer; resuspend to 100 µM stock

steps.title: PCR using Q5 polymerase, Q5 buffer,...
steps.instruction: PCR using Q5 polymerase, Q5 buffer, 50 µL reaction, 12 samples (including NTC), 30 cycles [98°C 10s / 60°C 30s / 72°C 30s/kb]

steps.title: Perform Gel Electrophoresis with 1% agarose,...
steps.instruction: Perform Gel Electrophoresis with 1% agarose, 100 V, for 30 minutes

steps.title: Clean Up & Concentrate using QIAquick...
steps.instruction: Clean Up & Concentrate using QIAquick kit, elute 30 µL in kit-provided buffer (EB)

steps.title: Modular Gibson Assembly with NEBuilder HiFi,...
steps.instruction: Modular Gibson Assembly with NEBuilder HiFi, 12 fragments (including pSB1C3 backbone), 50°C, 60 minutes, 20 µL

steps.title: Transformation & Plating using DH5α electrocompetent, 1
steps.instruction: Transformation & Plating using DH5α electrocompetent, 1.8 kV, 1 hour SOC recovery, plate on LB + cm 25 µg/mL

steps.title: Colony PCR with 8 colonies +...
steps.instruction: Colony PCR with 8 colonies + NTC, VR/VF2 primers, Taq, 25 cycles

steps.title: Gel Electrophoresis with 1% agarose, 100 V, for 45 minutes
steps.instruction: Gel Electrophoresis with 1% agarose, 100 V, for 45 minutes

steps.title: Overnight Inoculum
steps.instruction: Overnight Inoculum: Pick 3 positives → 5 mL LB + cm, 37°C / 250 rpm / 16 hours

steps.title: TapeStation with Genomic DNA ScreenTape, dilute...
steps.instruction: TapeStation with Genomic DNA ScreenTape, dilute to 50 ng/µL, 1 µL load

steps.title: Illumina NextSeq 2000 using Nextera XT, 2×150 paired-end, 100× coverage
steps.instruction: Illumina NextSeq 2000 using Nextera XT, 2×150 paired-end, 100× coverage

steps.title: Glycerol Stock with 25% glycerol, 1 mL aliquots, −80°C
steps.instruction: Glycerol Stock with 25% glycerol, 1 mL aliquots, −80°C

steps.title: Induction in 96-well black/clear, 200 µL...
steps.instruction: Induction in 96-well black/clear, 200 µL LB + cm + inducer, induce at OD 0.3–0.5, 5 hours at 37°C; inducer: Arabinose 0.2% (w/v) or constitutive

steps.title: Synergy H1 Fluorescence
steps.instruction: Synergy H1 Fluorescence: Ex 485 nm / Em 528 nm, gain 75, kinetic 15 min × 5 hr, normalize F/OD600
